param.value: {Benefits=Insurance, defense R&D exposure, innovation work, and long term technical growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Karnataka, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Artificial Intelligence and Autonomy, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=21-08-2026, Expiry Date=11-07-2026, Job Description=Develop autonomous strike logic, mission behavior, and smart decision systems for UAV platforms., Job Posting Name=Autonomous Strike Systems Recruitment 01, Job Requirements=Experience in autonomy logic, AI systems, mission workflows, and intelligent control., Job Title=Autonomous Strike Systems Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=Yes, Required Education=M.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1900000, Salary From 2=2500001, Salary From 3=3300001, Salary To 1=2500000, Salary To 2=3300000, Salary To 3=4100000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have autonomy or intelligent control experience in UAV or robotics systems?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on mission logic, automated response, or autonomous behaviors?, Screening Question 3=Which AI or autonomy frameworks have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}

param.value: {Benefits=Insurance, hardware exposure, mission systems role, and technical learning., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Telangana, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Avionics, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=25-08-2026, Expiry Date=13-07-2026, Job Description=Support power electronics, onboard wiring, and avionics subsystem health for UAV platforms., Job Posting Name=UAV Power Electronics Recruitment 02, Job Requirements=Experience in avionics electronics, power distribution, and onboard system troubleshooting., Job Title=UAV Power Electronics Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=2, Remote=No, Required Education=B.Tech, Required Experience=Mid-senior, Salary From 1=950000, Salary From 2=1350001, Salary From 3=1750001, Salary To 1=1350000, Salary To 2=1750000, Salary To 3=2150000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have avionics or onboard power electronics experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you handled UAV electronics integration or troubleshooting?, Screening Question 3=Which avionics or power modules have you worked on?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Close Job}

{Benefits=Insurance, mission critical role, systems depth, and strong growth path., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Maharashtra, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Flight Control Systems, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=29-08-2026, Expiry Date=15-07-2026, Job Description=Improve flight stability, response tuning, and control law performance for drone platforms., Job Posting Name=Stability Control Recruitment 03, Job Requirements=Experience in flight control, stability tuning, control systems, and response validation., Job Title=Stability Control Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=No, Required Education=B.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1650000, Salary From 2=2250001, Salary From 3=2850001, Salary To 1=2250000, Salary To 2=2850000, Salary To 3=3450000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have flight control or stability tuning experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on controller tuning or response optimization?, Screening Question 3=Which tools have you used for control analysis?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}

{Benefits=Insurance, AI mission work, research exposure, and strong technical growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Haryana, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Computer Vision, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=02-09-2026, Expiry Date=17-07-2026, Job Description=Develop image intelligence, target recognition, and tracking systems for ISR drones., Job Posting Name=ISR Vision Analytics Recruitment 04, Job Requirements=Experience in computer vision, image analytics, detection pipelines, and deployment., Job Title=ISR Vision Analytics Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=2, Remote=Yes, Required Education=M.Tech, Required Experience=Mid-senior, Salary From 1=1450000, Salary From 2=1950001, Salary From 3=2550001, Salary To 1=1950000, Salary To 2=2550000, Salary To 3=3150000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have vision analytics or target detection experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you built image tracking or scene intelligence pipelines?, Screening Question 3=Which vision tools or frameworks have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}

param.value: {Benefits=Insurance, firmware ownership, core systems exposure, and career growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=West Bengal, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=Embedded Systems, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=05-09-2026, Expiry Date=19-07-2026, Job Description=Develop flight firmware, hardware interfaces, and low level real time UAV functions., Job Posting Name=Flight Firmware Recruitment 05, Job Requirements=Experience in embedded C, RTOS, microcontrollers, and debugging., Job Title=Flight Firmware Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=2, Remote=No, Required Education=B.Tech, Required Experience=Mid-senior, Salary From 1=950000, Salary From 2=1350001, Salary From 3=1800001, Salary To 1=1350000, Salary To 2=1800000, Salary To 3=2250000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have embedded firmware or flight stack experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked with RTOS or real time systems?, Screening Question 3=Which MCU or debugging tools have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Close Job}

{Benefits=Insurance, communications specialization, hardware exposure, and growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Tamil Nadu, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=UAV Engineering, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=07-09-2026, Expiry Date=21-07-2026, Job Description=Design secure telemetry channels, communication validation, and UAV link reliability., Job Posting Name=Secure Telemetry Recruitment 06, Job Requirements=Experience in RF systems, telemetry links, antennas, and communication testing., Job Title=Secure Telemetry Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=No, Required Education=B.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1450000, Salary From 2=1950001, Salary From 3=2550001, Salary To 1=1950000, Salary To 2=2550000, Salary To 3=3150000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have telemetry or RF communication experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on secure or reliable UAV links?, Screening Question 3=Which RF validation tools have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Enable Waitlist}

{Benefits=Insurance, mission systems role, technical depth, and strong growth., Category=Information Technology, City / State=Uttar Pradesh, Country=India, Currency 1=INR(₹), Currency 2=INR(₹), Currency 3=INR(₹), Department / Division=UAV Engineering, Employment Type=Full Time, Expected Hiring Date=09-09-2026, Expiry Date=23-07-2026, Job Description=Develop guidance algorithms, navigation fusion, and route precision for UAV missions., Job Posting Name=Guidance Algorithms Recruitment 07, Job Requirements=Experience in navigation logic, GPS INS fusion, and guidance algorithms., Job Title=Guidance Algorithms Engineer, Job Urgency=High, Number of Positions=1, Remote=No, Required Education=M.Tech, Required Experience=Senior, Salary From 1=1750000, Salary From 2=2350001, Salary From 3=2950001, Salary To 1=2350000, Salary To 2=2950000, Salary To 3=3550000, Save As Job Posting Template=No, Screening Question 1=Do you have guidance or navigation algorithm experience?, Screening Question 2=Have you worked on route control or navigation fusion?, Screening Question 3=Which algorithms or tools have you used?, Select Template=Custom Template, Unit 1=Per Annum, Unit 2=Per Annum, Unit 3=Per Annum, When Positions Fulfilled=Close Job}
